files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 375219d..178c24e 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,23 +2,25 @@
 
 ## Strategic Overview
-SURVIVAL MODE (CRITICAL). Cash: $19.8k. Runway: ~6 weeks.
-Pivot (Week 21): Forced S3 Power Users to Plan C ($99) using quota limits (Plan A < 100 units, Plan B < 300 units). 
-Fixed unit economics: Tier 2 (0.75x) for Plan B/C provides adequate quality for S3/D_S07 while maintaining margin (~$67-88/mo per sub).
-Support Crisis: Social media posts show widespread frustration with slow support. Increased Ops spend to $250/day.
+SURVIVAL MODE (CRITICAL). Cash: $16.4k. 
+Week 22 Crisis: 0 new subscribers, 5 cancellations. Quality-expectation gap + Outage + Competitor events (ApexSaaS +0.05).
+Pivot (Week 22): Massive quality boost for top plans. Plan B/C moved to Tier 3 (0.9x quality). Plan A lowered to $24.
+Operations: Increased to $400/day to clear issue backlog and repair reputation.
+Development: Reduced to $50/day to preserve runway.
 
-## Strategy (Week 21)
-- Prices: A=29, B=59, C=99. 
-- Quotas: A=100, B=300, C=2M. (Forces S3/S2 to higher plans).
-- Tiers: A=1 (0.6x), B=2 (0.75x), C=2 (0.75x). 
-- Spend: Global Dev $100, Global Ops $250. 
-- Ads: $60/day ($20 each for Search/D_S07, Content/S2, Social/S3).
-- Promo: $20 lead promotion to boost conversion of the ~12 leads/week.
+## Strategy (Week 22)
+- Prices: A=24, B=59, C=129.
+- Tiers: A=1 (0.6x), B=3 (0.9x), C=3 (0.9x).
+- Quotas: A=100, B=500, C=10M.
+- Lead Promo: $20 global (one-time).
+- Ads: $80/day targeted (S3, D_S07, S2).
+- Goal: Convert leads into Plan B ($59) by offering high quality (T3) at a competitive price.
 
 ## Key Metrics Tracking
-- Day 147: $19.8k cash, 42 subs. MRR ~$1.3k (Pre-pivot). Estimated New MRR ~$3k.
-- Burn: ~$3.2k/week estimated after pivot.
+- Day 154: $16.4k cash, 37 subs (30A, 6B, 1C). MRR $1.3k.
+- Runway: ~4-5 weeks at current burn (~$4.4k/week).
+- Conversions: 0 last week (catastrophic). Need >3 conversions/week to start extending runway.
 
 ## Insights
-- S3 Power Users were hiding on Plan A ($24) despite using 5x the average tokens. Quota enforcement is key.
-- D_S10 needs Tier 3+ (0.9x+) quality to buy; current Tier 2 focus on D_S07/S3 is a compromise for survival.
-- Operations backlog is damaging reputation; fixed by doubling global ops spend.
+- Competitors (ApexSaaS) raised expectations significantly. Tier 2 (0.75x) is no longer enough for quality-sensitive groups.
+- Outages are extremely damaging to S3 (Power Users); reliability is priority #1.
+- S1 is sensitive to both price and quality; $24/T1 is a test.
